recommendations.title: Blade
recommendations.overview: The Daywalker known as "Blade" - a half-vampire, half-mortal man - becomes the protector of humanity against an underground army of vampires.

recommendations.title: The Unborn
recommendations.overview: A young woman fights the spirit that is slowly taking possession of her.

recommendations.title: The Invisible
recommendations.overview: After an attack leaves him in limbo -- invisible to the living and also near death -- a teenager discovers the only person who might be able help him is his attacker.

recommendations.title: Major League II
recommendations.overview: After losing in the ALCS the year before, the Cleveland Indians are determined to make it into the World Series this time! However, they first have to contend with Rachel Phelps again when she buys back the team.

recommendations.title: King Ralph
recommendations.overview: As the only relative in line to ascend the Royal throne, a down-on-his-luck American slob must learn the ways of the English.

recommendations.title: Kizumonogatari Part 1: Tekketsu
recommendations.overview: One day, Koyomi Araragi encounters the horrifying vampire, Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade A.K.A. the "King of Apparitions." He saves the fatally wounded Kiss-shot by offering his blood at the expense of his own life as a human. Now Koyomi

recommendations.title: Kizumonogatari Part 2: Nekketsu
recommendations.overview: Koyomi Araragi was turned into a vampire by the legendary vampire, Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade, and he needs to revive the weakened vampire back to her complete form to return to being human again. The only way for Koyomi to achieve his

recommendations.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: Vampire death dealer Selene fends off brutal attacks from both the Lycan clan and the Vampire faction that betrayed her. With her only allies, David and his father Thomas, she must stop the eternal war between Lycans and Vampires, even if it means sh

recommendations.title: The Program
recommendations.overview: Several players from different backgrounds try to cope with the pressures of playing football at a major university. Each deals with the pressure differently, some turn to drinking, others to drugs, and some to studying.

recommendations.title: Blade II
recommendations.overview: Blade forms an uneasy alliance with the vampire council in order to combat the Reapers, who are feeding on vampires.
